fixtures._comment: chat-slots D5 probe (d5-chat-slots.ts) — single turn proving the messageView.assistantMessage slot override renders (data-slot-label=MessageView.AssistantMessage). context:hermes isolates per-integration.

response.content: Confirmed — the chat-slots demo is rendering through the custom slot wrappers. The CustomAssistantMessage component should be visible as a tinted card with a 'slot' badge in the corner.

fixtures._comment: chat-slots e2e (chat-slots.spec.ts) — 'Tell me a joke' suggestion pill sends this message.

response.content: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!

fixtures._comment: chat-slots e2e — typed first turn 'Say hello in one short sentence'.

match.userMessage: Say hello in one short sentence

response.content: Hi! In one short sentence: I'm a CopilotKit demo agent here to help you try features.

fixtures._comment: chat-slots e2e — typed second turn 'Give me a fun fact', asserting the second assistant turn is also wrapped in the custom slot (the reply text is not asserted). Content kept identical to headless-simple.json's fun-fact fixture so the shared context:hermes key resolves deterministically regardless of which fixture file aimock scans first.

response.content: A fun fact: Honey never spoils! Archaeologists have found pots of honey in ancient Egyptian tombs that are over 3,000 years old and still perfectly edible.
